biography: Rasmus, representing Vihti Golf Club, etched his name into the records of the Hector Trophée through a distinct, solitary appearance. His participation offered a glimpse of his capabilities on the challenging greens and fairways of this prestigious pairs competition.

During his single outing, Rasmus engaged with the rigorous multi-day format, which encompasses both individual and team play. Despite a dedicated effort to contend, the formidable competitive landscape meant that neither the coveted Hector Trophée nor the esteemed Victor Trophy for individual excellence came within his grasp. His engagement underscored the high bar for success set by the tournament's seasoned field.

Having made his mark, Rasmus has since withdrawn from active competition in Hector events. Consequently, he will not be among the distinguished field for the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, bringing a quiet close to his chapter in this unique tournament's history.
